name: shuck-channel
description: Channel shim for shuck's self-hosted event router: a per-session stdio MCP server that holds one outbound WebSocket to your shuck gateway and pushes distilled CI-failure / PR events into the session as channel notifications. Adds shuck_subscribe / shuck_unsubscribe tools. Strictly opt-in: without SHUCK_CHANNEL_GATEWAY_URL and SHUCK_CHANNEL_TOKEN configured it connects to nothing and stays silent. Independent of (and composable with) the shuck plugin's pull-based tools.
